name: Google Compute Engine Shielded VM (vTPM)
description: GCE Shielded VMs include a virtual TPM implemented by Google's hypervisor. CRTM identifies the virtual firmware generation. Suitable for per-VM attestation when Shielded VM is enabled.
ek-root-ca-source: https://pki.goog/ — Google vTPM EK intermediate chains from the google-cloud-platform attestation endpoints.
notes: Shielded VMs also populate PCR 0 with a predictable per-firmware-version digest; see https://cloud.google.com/compute/shielded-vm/docs/integrity-monitoring#baseline_policies for the expected baselines. Shielded VM with SEV / SEV-SNP / TDX routes to AMD-SEV-SNP-specific attestation in addition to vTPM.
source: Google Cloud docs + observed CRTM strings in go-eventlog test vectors (gce-ubuntu-2104, gce-coreos-no-sb).
